Microscopy (Spun Urine)
📋 WHO 2021 reference values used. Abstinence period: 2–7 days.
⚠️ BSL-2 precautions required. N95 mask is mandatory for all ZN stain procedures. Handle all sputum as potentially infectious.

Gadaref Surgical Clinic Laboratory
Surgical Clinic & Medical Laboratory
Omer Abdelgader, B.Sc. Microbiology
⚙️ Database Setup SQL

Run this single SQL script in Supabase → SQL Editor → Run to set up all tables and columns. Safe to run multiple times (all statements use IF NOT EXISTS). Covers: core tables, result columns (analysis_date, is_verified, has_critical), sample_records, extended chemistry/hematology/microbiology columns, invoices insurance fields, and all secondary tables.

💰 Patient Invoice

🏷️ Print Barcode Labels

Select which department labels to print. One label will be generated per department based on the tests requested.

🖨️ Barcode Label — Print Preview

⚡ ZPL Label Code — Zebra Thermal Printer

⚡ ZPL = Zebra Programming Language — Send this code directly to a Zebra ZD420/GK420 or compatible thermal printer via USB/Network. Each tube gets its own label with Code-128 barcode + QR code.
💡 Network print: nc -w1 PRINTER_IP 9100 < label.zpl  |  USB (Windows): copy label.zpl LPT1
